Quality Education.reason: Focus on academic writing and research skills aligns with Target 4.4 ('increase relevant skills').
The course is a form of tertiary education (Target 4.3) designed to help graduate students develop advanced academic skills by '撰寫學位論文' (writing degree theses).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course focuses on 'Administrative Law,' which is fundamental to promoting the rule of law (Target 16.3) and building effective and accountable institutions (Target 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course requires using '日本行政法為參考比較對象' (Japanese administrative law as a comparative reference), promoting international knowledge sharing and cooperation (Target 17.6).
